chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI H.C.A. No. 278 of 2021 _____________________________________________________ Date Order.with signature of Judge Hearing/Priority 1.For hearing of main case 2.For hearing of CMA No.2308/21 (stay) 19.10.2023 Khawaja Shoaib Mansoor, Advocate for Appellant......... Learned counsel, on instructions, does not press this High Court Appeal, which is dismissed as such having not been pressed along with interlocutory orders passed in this matter which are, however, merged in this final order of this Court. J U D G E J U D G E Ashraf
